zh.Höningen, Altleiningen, Bad Dürkheim, Pa: 德國海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 巴德 迪可海姆阿爾特萊寧根賀寧根
zh.lifeSummary: 當Frederick VII von Leiningen於大約1325年出生在德國貝也普法爾茲時，他的父親Friedrich VI von Leiningen38歲，母親Jutta von Isenburg-Limburg30歲。他於大約1349年與Jolanthe von Jülich在德國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1387年10月31日在德國海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 巴德 迪可海姆阿爾特萊寧根賀寧根享年63歲，埋葬在德國海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 巴德 迪可海姆阿爾特萊寧根賀寧根。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Frederick VII von Leiningen于大约1325年出生在德国貝也普法爾茲时，他的父亲Friedrich VI von Leiningen38岁，母亲Jutta von Isenburg-Limburg30岁。他于大约1349年与Jolanthe von Jülich在德国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1387年10月31日在德国海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 巴德 迪可海姆阿爾特萊寧根賀寧根享年63岁，埋葬在德国海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 巴德 迪可海姆阿爾特萊寧根賀寧根。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Leiningen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name for someone from any of several places called Leiningen.

nameMeanings.name: Frederick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic origin, from fred, frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced into Britain by them, but did not survive long. Modern use in Britain dates from the 17th century, and it became more frequent in the 18th among followers of the Elector of Hanover, who in 1714 became George I of England. It was reinforced by the vogue for Germanic names in Victorian times.

variants.name: Fredrick
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic origin, from fred, frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced into Britain by them, but did not survive long. Modern use in Britain dates from the 17th century, and it became more frequent in the 18th among followers of the Elector of Hanover, who in 1714 became George I of England. It was reinforced by the vogue for Germanic names in Victorian times.

variants.name: Fredric
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic origin, from fred, frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced into Britain by them, but did not survive long. Modern use in Britain dates from the 17th century, and it became more frequent in the 18th among followers of the Elector of Hanover, who in 1714 became George I of England. It was reinforced by the vogue for Germanic names in Victorian times.

nameMeanings.name: VII
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Vivian   and   Vivien .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Frederick VII von Leiningen was born about 1325, in Palatinate, Bavaria, Germany, his father, Friedrich VI von Leiningen, was 38 and his mother, Jutta von Isenburg-Limburg, was 30. He married Jolanthe von Jülich about 1349, in Germany. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died on 31 October 1387, in Höningen, Altleiningen, Bad Dürkheim, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, at the age of 63, and was buried in Höningen, Altleiningen, Bad Dürkheim, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Frederick VII von Leiningen est né environ 1325, à Pfalz, Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Friedrich VI von Leiningen, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Jutta von Isenburg-Limburg, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Jolanthe von Jülich environ 1349, à Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 31 octobre 1387, à Höningen, Altleiningen, Landkreis Bad Dürkheim, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Höningen, Altleiningen, Landkreis Bad Dürkheim, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Frederick VII von Leiningen um 1325 in Pfalz, Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Friedrich VI von Leiningen 38 und seine Mutter Jutta von Isenburg-Limburg 30. Er hat um 1349 in Deutschland Jolanthe von Jülich geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 31. Oktober 1387 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Höningen, Altleiningen, Landkreis Bad Dürkheim, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland und wurde in Höningen, Altleiningen, Landkreis Bad Dürkheim, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Frederick VII von Leiningen è nato il circa 1325 nel Pfalz, Bayern, Germania, il suo padre, Friedrich VI von Leiningen, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Jutta von Isenburg-Limburg, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Jolanthe von Jülich circa 1349, nel Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì il 31 ottobre 1387, nel Höningen, Altleiningen, Landkreis Bad Dürkheim, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Höningen, Altleiningen, Landkreis Bad Dürkheim, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Frederick VII von Leiningenが約1325年にドイツバイエルンプファルズで生まれた時，父Friedrich VI von Leiningenは38歳，母Jutta von Isenburg-Limburgは30歳であった。約1349年にドイツでJolanthe von Jülichと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1387年10月31日にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズランドクレイス バド ドuルクヘイムアルトレイニンジェンhoニンジェンで63歳で死去し，ドイツルヘインランド-プファルズランドクレイス バド ドuルクヘイムアルトレイニンジェンhoニンジェンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Frederick VII von Leiningen(이)가 대략 1325년 독일 베이른 p팔즈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Friedrich VI von Leiningen(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Jutta von Isenburg-Limburg(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1349년 독일에서 Jolanthe von Jülich(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1387년 10월 31일 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 랜드크레이스 바드 드u르케임 알틀레이닝 ho닝에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 랜드크레이스 바드 드u르케임 알틀레이닝 ho닝에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Frederick VII von Leiningen nasceu aproximadamente 1325, em Pfalz, Bayern, Alemanha, seu pai, Friedrich VI von Leiningen, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Jutta von Isenburg-Limburg, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Jolanthe von Jülich aproximadamente 1349, em Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 31 de outubro de 1387, em Höningen, Altleiningen, Landkreis Bad Dürkheim, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Höningen, Altleiningen, Landkreis Bad Dürkheim, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha.

ru.Höningen, Altleiningen, Bad Dürkheim, Pa: хoнинген, алтлининген, ландкрис бад дuрхим, раинланд-пфалз, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Frederick VII von Leiningen родился около 1325 г. в местности пфалз, беиирн, Германия, его отцу по имени Friedrich VI von Leiningen было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Jutta von Isenburg-Limburg, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Jolanthe von Jülich около 1349 г. в местности Германия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер 31 октября 1387 г. в местности хoнинген, алтлининген, ландкрис бад дuрхим, раинланд-пфалз, Германия в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности хoнинген, алтлининген, ландкрис бад дuрхим, раинланд-пфалз, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Frederick VII von Leiningen nació aproximadamente 1325, en Pfalz, Bayern, Alemania, su papá, Friedrich VI von Leiningen, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Jutta von Isenburg-Limburg, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Jolanthe von Jülich aproximadamente 1349, en Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió el 31 de octubre de 1387, en Höningen, Altleiningen, Landkreis Bad Dürkheim, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Höningen, Altleiningen, Landkreis Bad Dürkheim, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania.
